description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem substation terminals. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, carray = aterminalchar(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation switching device quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: carray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: Name of the node to which the terminal is connected (40 characters).
Name of the bus to which the terminal’s node is connected (12 characters).
Extended bus name of the bus to which the terminal’s node is connected (18 characters).
Name of another bus connected to this device; returned as blanks except for two-terminal branches and three-winding transformers (12 characters).
Extended bus name of another bus connected to this device; returned as blanks except for two-terminal branches and three-winding transformers (18 characters).
Name of another bus connected to this device; returned as blanks except for three-winding transformers (12 characters).
Extended bus name of another bus connected to this device; returned as blanks except for three-winding transformers (18 characters).
Machine, load, fixed shunt, or circuit identifier (2 characters).

Flag indicatinm the type of terminal “L” for Load, “M” for Machine, “F” for Fixed Shunt, “S” for Switched Shunt, “2” for AC Line or Two-Winding Transformer, “3” for Three-Winding Transformer, “A” for FACTs, “V” for VSC DC line, “D” for two terminal DC line and “T” for multiple terminal DC line (1 characters).
Name of branch, transformer, FACTs, DC line, VSC DC line, mutliple terminal DC line (40 characters).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of CARRAY, is not large enough.
